options.name: --preset
options.description: Preset of default values for the other options. [default: Dev]

options.name: --compare-to
options.description: The target project or solution for comparison.

options.name: --project-analysis
options.description: Scope of the internal project analysis.

options.name: --external-analysis
options.description: Scope of the analysis of external dependencies.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Don't output anything. Equivalent to --mode None.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the resulting data set / visualization. Defaults to the SOURCE file name.

options.name: --out-file
options.description: Output file. Applies to SingleFile and DataOnly modes.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Set an MSBuild property for the loading of projects

options.name: --initial-depth
options.description: Initial expanded depth of the diagram.

options.name: --initial-relation
options.description: Initial selected relations of the diagram.

options.name: --initial-kind
options.description: Initial selected kinds of the diagram.

arguments.name: SOURCE
arguments.description: Path to a project or a solution. [default: <path>]
